_note: Tier-4 Phase 4.4 — Pass D rubric judge weights. The LLM scores 7 dimensions 0-10 per moment; this file maps each dimension to a weight that aggregates into rubric_score in [0,1]. final_score = 0.6 * pass_c_score + 0.4 * rubric_score. Edit weights freely; sum doesn't have to be 1.0 — the aggregator divides by the actual sum.
rejection_flag_demote_note: Per-moment final_score gets THIS additive offset (clamped to [0, 1]) for every rejection_flag. Demotes the moment to the bottom of the bucket without eliminating it.
mmr_lambda_note: Phase 4.6 MMR diversity ranker — lambda toward score (vs novelty). 0.7 is conservative; raise to 0.8 if early VODs feel under-selected.
fail_streak_note: Mirrors BUG 32 fail-fast: 3 consecutive network-shaped failures abort Pass D for the rest of the VOD. Surviving moments keep their Pass C score unchanged.
